contact.title: Contact
contact.description: To ask a question, discuss an upcoming event, or brainstorm ideas, please contact me by filling out the form below. Alternatively, you can send me an e-mail or give me a call!

form.messagePlaceholder: Ask a question or let me know how I can help
form.successMessage: Thank you! Your message has been successfully sent.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
